calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Written Responses To Written Interrogatories, Req. For Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court modifies and adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff AT&T ADVERTISING LP'S Motion for Order Compelling Responses to Written Responses to Written Interrogatories, Request for Documents is DENIED as moot. Discovery appears to have been sent and received as of 6/10/13. No sanctions will be awarded. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
